title: Invalid N8N_PORT value in Docker deployment
symptom: When deploying n8n using Docker, the error 'Invalid number value for N8N_PORT' occurs during the 'kubectl apply' command.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different deployment method (e.g., npm)
root_cause: The error arises because the configuration for the N8N_PORT includes an invalid property 'protocol: TCP'. This property is not expected in the environment variable settings for the container, leading to the invalid number error.
fix_steps: Open the Kubernetes deployment configuration file
Remove the line 'protocol: TCP' from the configuration
agent_instruction: Remove the 'protocol: TCP' line from your Docker deployment configuration and redeploy.
